header.title: Error Boundary
header.description: Isolating UI errors and ensuring application stability.

intro.title: Concept
intro.description: Error boundaries are React components that catch JavaScript errors anywhere in their child component tree, log those errors, and display a fallback UI.

structure.title: Module Architecture
structure.description: Following FSD, the core error boundary code is located in the Shared layer.

items.global: A global wrapper is mandatory for the entire application.
items.widgets: All widgets must be isolated using withErrorBoundary.
items.logging: Automatic logging to the console (dev) and monitoring system.
